page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: APIs for Galaxy machine learning tools
page_metadata.biotools__summary:
Accessible, Reproducible, and Scalable Machine Learning for Biomedicine.

Galaxy-ML is a web machine learning end-to-end pipeline building framework, with special support to biomedical data.
